Description: Initial setup of the India Startup Ecosystem Intelligence Platform, SQLite DB schema, ingestion pipeline (scraping, cleaning, entity resolution, AI enrichment), exporter script, FastAPI routing, and basic React cyberpunk dark-mode interface.

Initialize backend framework using FastAPI, define sqlite database schemas for startups, incubators, mentors, investors, relationships, and execution logs in database.py, and setup run.py configuration.
Implement simulated crawler scraper.py to load initial raw data, and cleaner.py normalization rules for cleaning/standardizing state codes, city names, emails, and URLs.
Develop entity resolution pipeline in resolution.py utilizing Jaccard string similarity, acronym matching, and short-name rules to merge duplicate startup and incubator records.
Implement enricher.py integrating Google Gemini API for automated sector mapping, semantic summarization, and local lookup table matching for city coordinates geocoding.
Develop exporter module graph.py supporting output of parsed data as a zipped CSV archive, hierarchical JSON, MongoDB insertions, or Neo4j Cypher scripts.

Build FastAPI endpoints in main.py for pipeline run execution (/api/pipeline/run), pipeline logging (/api/pipeline/logs), database reset, directories (/api/incubators, /api/startups), and export file streaming.
Setup Vite + React web client, configure Tailwind CSS v4 and vanilla glassmorphism styles in index.css, and build sidebar dashboard shell App.jsx.
Create PipelineControl.jsx component showing pipeline stage execution buttons (scrape, clean, resolve, enrich) with interactive terminal log stream outputs.

Summary: Build Directory Grid & Details Drawer UI
Description: Develop DirectoryView.jsx grid showing startups/incubators with query search, sector/stage/region filters, and detailed profile slide-out drawer.
Develop AnalyticsDashboard.jsx UI compiling total counts, state map distributions, focus sectors, stage-wise graphs, and SVGs/CSS chart components.
Create GraphVisualizer.jsx rendering zoomable, draggable 2D canvas force-directed nodes showing linkages between incubators, startups, and mentors.

Summary: Build Exporter and AI Assistant Panels
Description: Develop ExporterPanel.jsx UI for downloading exports, and AiAssistant.jsx chatbot interface that interacts with FastAPI backend assistant API.

Summary: Build MOU Generator & Opportunity Finder UIs
Description: Implement MouGenerator.jsx step-by-step drafting form with download options, and OpportunityFinder.jsx recommendation cards connecting startups to matching programs.
Create OutreachAutomation.jsx, supporting Google OAuth flow authorization, Gmail/Calendar client integration parameters, email trigger, and IMAP reply-checking background loops.
Integrate MongoDB persistence into the database layer, build query adapter wrappers, support database fallbacks, and optimize individual UI views.

Summary: Implement MongoDB Connections in Database Layer
Description: Integrate pymongo client into database.py with connection routines get_mongo_client and get_mongo_db.

Summary: Build SQL-to-Mongo Query Parsers and Adapters
Description: Create query parse_where_clause and helper classes in database.py to map SQL conditions into MongoDB filters, enabling abstract query operations across database engines.
Implement clean_email_reply in main.py to scrub header/quote garbage from incoming email replies before processing sentiment details.

Summary: Apply Frontend Refinements and Core View Optimization
Description: Update React components (DirectoryView, MouGenerator, OpportunityFinder, OutreachAutomation) with bugfixes, CSS adjustments, and minor visual optimizations.
Design and implement automated multi-stage follow-up email campaigns, checking logs and exclusions, and providing triggers in the Outreach dashboard.

Summary: Build Backend Multi-Stage Follow-up Campaign Logic
Description: Implement send_followup_email and check_and_send_followups_sync in main.py to check status, verify elapsed days since last contact, skip replied leads, and send appropriate template emails.

Summary: Develop Follow-up Trigger and Bulk APIs
Description: Implement FastAPI endpoints /api/outreach/send-followups for background loop triggers, and /api/outreach/send-followup-single for specific lead execution.

Summary: Update Outreach Automation UI with Follow-up Controls
Description: Modify OutreachAutomation.jsx with campaign triggers, follow-up statuses, and log displays for follow-up mailings.

Summary: PII Field-Level Encryption & Startup Cohort Evaluator
Description: Develop secure startup application evaluation, symmetric AES field-level PII encryption, duplicate cosine similarity matrix engine, cohort uploader UI, and detail drawer integrations.
Develop encrypt_val and decrypt_val methods in evaluator.py using AES-256 Fernet symmetric cryptography to protect name, email, mobile, DOB, and address fields in Mongo.
Develop Excel cohort loader in evaluator.py mapping dynamic spreadsheet headers, cleaning revenue string formats, parsing team sizes, and verifying DPIIT numbers.
Implement evaluate_rules in evaluator.py calculating score parameters (Revenue 10pts, Stage 10pts, DPIIT 5pts, Team 5pts, Web 5pts, Presentation 5pts) for a maximum of 40 raw points.

Summary: Build Pairwise TF-IDF Duplicate Detection Engine
Description: Create compute_similarity_matrix in evaluator.py to calculate TF-IDF vector matrices and pairwise cosine similarity, flagging duplicate submissions matching above 40% and 80%.
Build FastAPI endpoints in main.py for Excel ingestion (/api/incubein/upload), list retrieval decrypting on-the-fly (/api/incubein/applications), deletion, and bulk directory/campaign import APIs.
Build CohortEvaluator.jsx layout supporting drag-and-drop Excel files, processing pipeline telemetry, and highlighting high-similarity duplicate flag pairs.
Develop StartupsDirectory.jsx component exhibiting decrypted contact details, rule-based breakdowns, AI summary notes, duplicate tags, and cohort sorting.

Summary: Update Global Sidebar, Router, and Design Styles
Description: Integrate cohort evaluation tabs, styles, and utilities across main application layouts App.jsx, App.css, index.css, and navigation sidebar.
